title_index: Kurd Cut | Premium Booking for Barbers & Salons
meta_desc: Kurd Cut is the modern booking platform for barbers, hair salons, beauty salons, and nail shops. Discover trusted professionals and manage your business.
hero_subtitle: Discover elite barbers, hair salons, and nail artists. Book seamlessly.
mission_text: Kurd Cut is not just an appointment app. It is a curated ecosystem where modern design meets flawless utility. We bring the world's best professionals to your fingertips.
hiw_subtitle: Three simple steps to your perfect grooming experience.
hiw_step1_desc: Browse top-rated barbers, salons, and nail artists near you. Filter by service, rating, or availability.
hiw_step2_desc: Choose your preferred time slot and send a booking request. Get instant confirmation from the business.
hiw_step3_desc: Show up, relax, and enjoy a premium grooming experience. Rate and review when you're done.
eco_customer_f1: Explore top-rated barbers, salons, and nail shops.
eco_customer_f2: Choose your perfect slot and send booking requests.
eco_biz_f1: Receive, accept, or reject requests instantly.
test_subtitle: Trusted by professionals and customers across the region.
test_1_quote: Kurd Cut completely changed how I run my barbershop. Bookings are seamless, and my revenue has grown 40% since joining.
test_2_quote: Finally, a booking app that feels premium. I love discovering new salons and booking in seconds. It's so easy!
test_3_quote: The analytics dashboard is incredible. I can track every appointment and understand my busiest hours at a glance.
app_subtitle: Experience the beautifully crafted mobile application.
faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about Kurd Cut.
faq_q1: Is Kurd Cut free to use?
faq_a1: Absolutely! Kurd Cut is completely free for customers. Download the app, create an account, and start booking your favorite barbers and salons instantly.
faq_q2: How do businesses join the platform?
faq_a2: We maintain an exclusive network. Businesses are manually vetted and onboarded by our team to ensure the highest quality of service. Contact our partnership team to apply.
faq_q3: Which cities is Kurd Cut available in?
faq_a3: We are currently expanding across the Kurdistan Region of Iraq including Erbil, Sulaimani, Duhok, and surrounding areas with plans for wider expansion.
faq_q4: Can I cancel or reschedule a booking?
faq_a4: Yes! You can easily cancel or reschedule appointments directly through the app. We recommend doing so at least 2 hours before your scheduled time.
faq_a5: Payments for services are handled directly at the shop. Business subscription fees are managed through our administration team with flexible payment options.
dl_subtitle: Available on iOS and Android. Start booking your next grooming experience today.
privacy_p1: At Kurd Cut, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information.
terms_p1: Welcome to Kurd Cut. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
sub_intro: Kurd Cut is an exclusive network. We do not offer open registration for businesses. Instead, we manually vet and onboard every barber, salon, and nail business to ensure our customers experience only the highest standard of service.
sub_b1_desc: Position your brand alongside the top grooming and beauty professionals in the region. Gain visibility to a vast network of customers actively seeking high-end services.
sub_b2_desc: Receive instant booking requests. Accept or reject with a single tap. Our system automatically handles customer notifications so you can focus on your craft.
sub_b3_desc: Unlock a powerful dashboard designed to track your daily revenue, analyze business performance insights, and understand your customer demographics.
sub_contact_desc: If you believe your business meets the Kurd Cut standard, please reach out to our administration team. We will review your application and guide you through our tailored subscription tiers to set up your exclusive dashboard.
